title: Security Analyst
description:
Brex provides financial products for ambitious companies. We've issued billions in credit to fast-growing businesses.

We're seeking a Security Analyst to join our Fintech team in San Diego. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Monitor network and application security using SIEM and security tools
Investigate security incidents and conduct root cause analysis
Implement security controls and vulnerability assessments
Support security compliance and audit activities
Develop security documentation and incident response procedures
Collaborate with development teams on secure coding practices

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Cybersecurity, Computer Science, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years in security operations, penetration testing, or security engineering

benefits: Hybrid work arrangement in San Diego
